homepageAudit.title: Resumora | Executive resume studio — ATS-safe, bilingual EN/FR

gbpOperatorTodo.hint: Yes — link to https://resumora.net/contact (or live booking URL). Match primary CTA on site.
Yes — scoped quotes aligned with /pricing; avoid unbounded promises.
Yes — primary delivery is remote; service area: online / worldwide plus any real local areas.
Yes — concierge intake; avoids walk-in mismatch with studio positioning.
Enable multilingual + EN/FR explicitly where GBP allows both.
List French; align with bilingual solution pages on resumora.net.
Categories + services: resume writer / career counselor taxonomy closest to region; services mirror /services + /solutions/*.
Include career coaching where offered (e.g. /solutions/career-coaching); do not over-claim outside scope.
Service area: worldwide/online; hours accurate; website UTM optional: ?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=organic
Site: JSON-LD Organization/WebSite + factual GBP description; GSC sitemap; no keyword stuffing.
Reviews + owner replies; photos; Q&A; consistent NAP with site footer; no duplicate listings.

missingOptimizationPoints: No NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCIAL_* / NEXT_PUBLIC_ORG_SAME_AS in env — cross-channel parity with GBP social links unverified locally.
homepageAudit.disclaimer: This audit does not call Google Business Profile APIs or modify Maps. Apply attributes in GBP UI or Business Profile API after OAuth.

issues: NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID not set in this environment (GA4 snippet will not load in dev).
NEXT_PUBLIC_GSC_VERIFICATION not set (GSC HTML tag verification will not emit).
NEXT_PUBLIC_ORG_SAME_AS not set (JSON-LD sameAs may be empty).
externalPlatformsPending: SE Ranking: connect properties + schedule audits (API key in Railway only).
NeuronWriter / LowFruits: keyword exports → human-reviewed content PRs (no auto page rewrites here).
GSC / Bing Webmaster: domain verification + sitemap submit in each dashboard.
GA4 + Clarity: confirm data collection after NEXT_PUBLIC_* ids are set on Render.
